title: 🩸 Sigil Bleed Phenomena
name: Sigil Bleed Phenomena
what_it_is: The symbolic leakage of high-charge glyphs—sigils that begin to seep from their boundaries, leaking intent or meaning into surrounding space.
how_to_use: her skin bore sigils that bled—intent dripping into the air like ink
his words triggered bleed—symbols spreading like contagion
animation_behavior: Sigils spread when touched or spoken, trails pulse and drip, environmental distortion near source ---
